name: Color Spray
description: You launch a dazzling array of flashing, colorful light. Each creature in a 15-foot Cone originating from you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition until the end of your next turn.
summary: You launch a dazzling array of flashing, colorful light. Each creature in a 15-foot Cone originating from you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition until the end of your next turn.
notes: Imported from dndbeyond_spells_with_sources_v23_final_balanced.csv. Full homebrew spell metadata is preserved in metadata.
